initial_message: Let's expand on the practical roadmap points that you wrote down. Explain in detail what is the goal of each point and what they require. If a single message is not enough, make a .md file and write everything in that. I want you to write it in a way so I can copy it into the claude project that I use to work on you (with claude sonnet 4.6) it will understand the message and it will be able to expand the goals into phases that I can work on separately with it.
